insight: Modern Paper 1.21.x (not just forks like AdvancedSlimePaper) uses per-plugin classloader isolation, which causes Class.forName() calls in HookManager to fail when trying to detect other plugins' classes. The fix is to pass the target plugin's classloader explicitly: Class.forName("class.name", true, Bukkit.getPluginManager().getPlugin("PluginName").getClass().getClassLoader()). This affects the Citizens detection at HookManager line 174.
